R1.label: R1
R1.config:
alias exec slaac show ipv6 interface GigabitEthernet5 | include Global
alias exec uptime show version | include uptime
alias exec slaac_c05054fffe345b02 show ipv6 interface GigabitEthernet5 | include 2001:db8:1700:21f8:7ec0:5054:ff:fe34:5b02
interface GigabitEthernet5
 description OOB Mgmt | TG-192 | 2001:db8:1700:21f8:7ec0:5054:ff:fe34:5b02
